headline: Penguins Launch Space Program Using Ice Rockets Filled With Krill Fuel
summary: First mission aims to colonize the moon for better fish access.
fullBody: The Antarctic Space Agency (ASA) successfully launched their inaugural flight. 'Waddle to the stars,' said mission control. Scientists are baffled by how the ice doesn't melt during re-entry. NASA offered to help but was told 'we got this, flippers only.'
